template.sql_template:
SELECT
  SUM(case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end) AS mrr
FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'

SELECT
  subscription__plan_type
  , SUM(__mrr) AS mrr
FROM (
  SELECT
    plan_type AS subscription__plan_type
    , case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end AS __mrr
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  subscription__plan_type

SELECT
  sem_subscribers_src_10000.country AS subscriber__country
  , SUM(subq_3.__mrr) AS mrr
FROM (
  SELECT
    subscriber_id AS subscriber
    , case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end AS __mrr
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_3
LEFT OUTER JOIN
  dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
ON
  subq_3.subscriber = sem_subscribers_src_10000.subscriber_id
GROUP BY
  sem_subscribers_src_10000.country

SELECT
  sem_subscribers_src_10000.cohort_month AS subscriber__cohort_month
  , SUM(subq_3.__mrr) AS mrr
FROM (
  SELECT
    subscriber_id AS subscriber
    , case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end AS __mrr
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_3
LEFT OUTER JOIN
  dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
ON
  subq_3.subscriber = sem_subscribers_src_10000.subscriber_id
GROUP BY
  sem_subscribers_src_10000.cohort_month

SELECT
  SUM(expansion_mrr) AS expansion_mrr
FROM (
  SELECT
    mrr_type AS subscription__mrr_type
    , case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end AS expansion_mrr
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_4
WHERE subscription__mrr_type = 'expansion'

SELECT
  subscription__plan_type
  , SUM(expansion_mrr) AS expansion_mrr
FROM (
  SELECT
    plan_type AS subscription__plan_type
    , mrr_type AS subscription__mrr_type
    , case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end AS expansion_mrr
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_4
WHERE subscription__mrr_type = 'expansion'
GROUP BY
  subscription__plan_type

SELECT
  subscriber__country
  , SUM(expansion_mrr) AS expansion_mrr
FROM (
  SELECT
    subq_3.subscription__mrr_type AS subscription__mrr_type
    , sem_subscribers_src_10000.country AS subscriber__country
    , subq_3.__expansion_mrr AS expansion_mrr
  FROM (
    SELECT
      subscriber_id AS subscriber
      , mrr_type AS subscription__mrr_type
      , case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end AS __expansion_mrr
    FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
  ) subq_3
  LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
  ON
    subq_3.subscriber = sem_subscribers_src_10000.subscriber_id
) subq_8
WHERE subscription__mrr_type = 'expansion'
GROUP BY
  subscriber__country

SELECT
  SUM(case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end) AS total_revenue
FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'

SELECT
  subscription__plan_type
  , SUM(__total_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM (
  SELECT
    plan_type AS subscription__plan_type
    , case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end AS __total_revenue
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  subscription__plan_type

SELECT
  sem_subscribers_src_10000.country AS subscriber__country
  , SUM(subq_3.__total_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM (
  SELECT
    subscriber_id AS subscriber
    , case when is_active then mrr_usd else 0 end AS __total_revenue
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_3
LEFT OUTER JOIN
  dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
ON
  subq_3.subscriber = sem_subscribers_src_10000.subscriber_id
GROUP BY
  sem_subscribers_src_10000.country

SELECT
  CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT case when mrr_type = 'churned' then subscriber_id end) AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT case when mrr_type != 'inactive' then subscriber_id end), 0) AS DOUBLE) AS churn_rate
FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'

SELECT
  subscription__plan_type
  , CAST(monthly_churned_subscribers AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NULLIF(monthly_subscriber_base, 0) AS DOUBLE) AS churn_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    subscription__plan_type
    , COUNT(DISTINCT __monthly_churned_subscribers) AS monthly_churned_subscribers
    , COUNT(DISTINCT __monthly_subscriber_base) AS monthly_subscriber_base
  FROM (
    SELECT
      plan_type AS subscription__plan_type
      , case when mrr_type = 'churned' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_churned_subscribers
      , case when mrr_type != 'inactive' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_subscriber_base
    FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
  ) subq_6
  GROUP BY
    subscription__plan_type
) subq_8

SELECT
  subscriber__country
  , CAST(monthly_churned_subscribers AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NULLIF(monthly_subscriber_base, 0) AS DOUBLE) AS churn_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    sem_subscribers_src_10000.country AS subscriber__country
    , COUNT(DISTINCT subq_4.__monthly_churned_subscribers) AS monthly_churned_subscribers
    , COUNT(DISTINCT subq_4.__monthly_subscriber_base) AS monthly_subscriber_base
  FROM (
    SELECT
      subscriber_id AS subscriber
      , case when mrr_type = 'churned' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_churned_subscribers
      , case when mrr_type != 'inactive' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_subscriber_base
    FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
  ) subq_4
  LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
  ON
    subq_4.subscriber = sem_subscribers_src_10000.subscriber_id
  GROUP BY
    sem_subscribers_src_10000.country
) subq_12

SELECT
  subscriber__churn_reason
  , CAST(monthly_churned_subscribers AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NULLIF(monthly_subscriber_base, 0) AS DOUBLE) AS churn_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    sem_subscribers_src_10000.churn_reason AS subscriber__churn_reason
    , COUNT(DISTINCT subq_4.__monthly_churned_subscribers) AS monthly_churned_subscribers
    , COUNT(DISTINCT subq_4.__monthly_subscriber_base) AS monthly_subscriber_base
  FROM (
    SELECT
      subscriber_id AS subscriber
      , case when mrr_type = 'churned' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_churned_subscribers
      , case when mrr_type != 'inactive' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_subscriber_base
    FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
  ) subq_4
  LEFT OUTER JOIN
    dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
  ON
    subq_4.subscriber = sem_subscribers_src_10000.subscriber_id
  GROUP BY
    sem_subscribers_src_10000.churn_reason
) subq_12

SELECT
  1 - churn_rate AS retention_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT case when mrr_type = 'churned' then subscriber_id end) AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT case when mrr_type != 'inactive' then subscriber_id end), 0) AS DOUBLE) AS churn_rate
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_9

SELECT
  subscription__plan_type
  , 1 - churn_rate AS retention_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    subscription__plan_type
    , CAST(monthly_churned_subscribers AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NULLIF(monthly_subscriber_base, 0) AS DOUBLE) AS churn_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      subscription__plan_type
      , COUNT(DISTINCT __monthly_churned_subscribers) AS monthly_churned_subscribers
      , COUNT(DISTINCT __monthly_subscriber_base) AS monthly_subscriber_base
    FROM (
      SELECT
        plan_type AS subscription__plan_type
        , case when mrr_type = 'churned' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_churned_subscribers
        , case when mrr_type != 'inactive' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_subscriber_base
      FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
      WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
    ) subq_6
    GROUP BY
      subscription__plan_type
  ) subq_8
) subq_9

SELECT
  subscriber__country
  , 1 - churn_rate AS retention_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    subscriber__country
    , CAST(monthly_churned_subscribers AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NULLIF(monthly_subscriber_base, 0) AS DOUBLE) AS churn_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      sem_subscribers_src_10000.country AS subscriber__country
      , COUNT(DISTINCT subq_4.__monthly_churned_subscribers) AS monthly_churned_subscribers
      , COUNT(DISTINCT subq_4.__monthly_subscriber_base) AS monthly_subscriber_base
    FROM (
      SELECT
        subscriber_id AS subscriber
        , case when mrr_type = 'churned' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_churned_subscribers
        , case when mrr_type != 'inactive' then subscriber_id end AS __monthly_subscriber_base
      FROM dummy.marts.fct_mrr_monthly sem_mrr_src_10000
      WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', period_month) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
    ) subq_4
    LEFT OUTER JOIN
      dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
    ON
      subq_4.subscriber = sem_subscribers_src_10000.subscriber_id
    GROUP BY
      sem_subscribers_src_10000.country
  ) subq_12
) subq_13

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscriber_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_subscribers
FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'

SELECT
  subscriber__plan_type
  , SUM(__total_subscribers) AS total_subscribers
FROM (
  SELECT
    plan_type AS subscriber__plan_type
    , CASE WHEN subscriber_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __total_subscribers
  FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  subscriber__plan_type

SELECT
  subscriber__country
  , SUM(__total_subscribers) AS total_subscribers
FROM (
  SELECT
    country AS subscriber__country
    , CASE WHEN subscriber_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __total_subscribers
  FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  subscriber__country

SELECT
  subscriber__acquisition_channel
  , SUM(__total_subscribers) AS total_subscribers
FROM (
  SELECT
    acquisition_channel AS subscriber__acquisition_channel
    , CASE WHEN subscriber_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __total_subscribers
  FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  subscriber__acquisition_channel

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN case when is_churned = true then subscriber_id else null end IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS churned_subscribers
FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'

SELECT
  subscriber__plan_type
  , SUM(__churned_subscribers) AS churned_subscribers
FROM (
  SELECT
    plan_type AS subscriber__plan_type
    , CASE WHEN case when is_churned = true then subscriber_id else null end IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __churned_subscribers
  FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  subscriber__plan_type

SELECT
  subscriber__country
  , SUM(__churned_subscribers) AS churned_subscribers
FROM (
  SELECT
    country AS subscriber__country
    , CASE WHEN case when is_churned = true then subscriber_id else null end IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __churned_subscribers
  FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  subscriber__country

SELECT
  CAST(MAX(subq_8.total_revenue_usd) AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NULLIF(MAX(subq_15.total_subscribers), 0) AS DOUBLE) AS ltv
FROM (
  SELECT
    SUM(case when status = 'succeeded' then amount_usd else 0 end) AS total_revenue_usd
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_payments sem_payments_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', payment_date) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_8
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN subscriber_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_subscribers
  FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_15

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) AS metric_time__day
    , subscriber_id AS subscriber
    , plan_type
    , plan_type AS subscriber__plan_type
    , CASE WHEN subscriber_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __total_subscribers
  FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
)

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', signup_date) AS metric_time__day
    , subscriber_id AS subscriber
    , country
    , country AS subscriber__country
    , CASE WHEN subscriber_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __total_subscribers
  FROM dummy.marts.dim_subscribers sem_subscribers_src_10000
)

SELECT
  AVG(duration_minutes) AS avg_watch_time
FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'

SELECT
  device_type AS session__device_type
  , AVG(duration_minutes) AS avg_watch_time
FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
GROUP BY
  device_type

SELECT
  quality_streamed AS session__quality_streamed
  , AVG(duration_minutes) AS avg_watch_time
FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
GROUP BY
  quality_streamed

SELECT
  referral_source AS session__referral_source
  , AVG(duration_minutes) AS avg_watch_time
FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
GROUP BY
  referral_source

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN session_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_sessions
FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'

SELECT
  session__device_type
  , SUM(__total_sessions) AS total_sessions
FROM (
  SELECT
    device_type AS session__device_type
    , CASE WHEN session_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __total_sessions
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  session__device_type

SELECT
  session__quality_streamed
  , SUM(__total_sessions) AS total_sessions
FROM (
  SELECT
    quality_streamed AS session__quality_streamed
    , CASE WHEN session_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __total_sessions
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  session__quality_streamed

SELECT
  session__referral_source
  , SUM(__total_sessions) AS total_sessions
FROM (
  SELECT
    referral_source AS session__referral_source
    , CASE WHEN session_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __total_sessions
  FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
) subq_5
GROUP BY
  session__referral_source

SELECT
  AVG(completion_pct) AS engagement_rate
FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'

SELECT
  device_type AS session__device_type
  , AVG(completion_pct) AS engagement_rate
FROM dummy.marts.fct_stream_sessions sem_stream_sessions_src_10000
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', session_start) BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
GROUP BY
  device_type
